creator: fnoyanisi@yahoo.com
text:
With the new version of gnome3, which is gnome3-3.18.0, the issue seems to be resolved. 

~ % pkg info gnome3
gnome3-3.18.0
Name           : gnome3
Version        : 3.18.0
Installed on   : Wed Apr  6 23:41:04 2016 NZST
Origin         : x11/gnome3
Architecture   : freebsd:10:*
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : x11 gnome
Licenses       : 
Maintainer     : gnome@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : http://www.FreeBSD.org/gnome/
Comment        : "meta-port" for the GNOME 3 integrated X11 desktop
Options        :
	DOCS           : on
	MAPI           : off
Annotations    :
	repo_type      : binary
	repository     : FreeBSD
Flat size      : 0.00B
Description    :
GNU Network Object Model Environment

This metaport installs the entire GNOME 3 desktop, including
the user applications released with it.

WWW: http://www.FreeBSD.org/gnome/
~ %
